hero.title: One single place for your entire wedding.
hero.subtitle: Mariage Afro is the international premium platform to orchestrate your Afro or mixed wedding from A to Z: verified vendors, integrated planning, day-of coordination.

home.service1_desc: From vision to reality: we orchestrate every detail of your big day, from A to Z, respecting your traditions.
home.service2_desc: Your day will unfold exactly as you dreamed it. Our team manages all logistics behind the scenes.
home.service3_desc: Access our exclusive network of vendors specialized in Afro and mixed weddings, wherever you are.
home.about_title: The art of celebrating the union of your cultures
home.about_text1: Every love story is unique, and when two cultures come together, they deserve a celebration that honors both heritages with elegance and respect.
home.about_text2: At Mariage Afro, we created a unique space where event excellence meets the richness of your traditions. We select the best vendors to make your vision an unforgettable reality.
home.cta_title: Ready to live your dream wedding?
home.cta_desc: Book an appointment with our team for a free consultation. Together we will build a project worthy of your love and cultures.
home.how_title: Three steps to an unforgettable wedding
home.how_subtitle: From the first meeting to the day after the wedding, we support you every step of the way.
home.how_step1_desc: We listen to your story, your cultures, your dreams and your budget to deeply understand your project.
home.how_step2_desc: Access your client space: budget, guests, planning, vendors, documents. All in one single place.
home.how_step3_desc: Our team coordinates everything behind the scenes. You only need to enjoy every moment.
home.already_client: Already a client? Access your area
home.meta_title: Mariage Afro — The Platform for Afro & Mixed Weddings

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From full planning to day-of coordination, we offer solutions adapted to your needs.
services.item1_desc: We handle the entire organization of your wedding, from venue search to day-of coordination.
services.item2_desc: You've already started planning but need help finalizing preparations and coordinating vendors.
services.item3_desc: Fully enjoy your day, we orchestrate the flow and manage any unforeseen events.
services.item4_desc: Your dream wedding has no borders. We organize exceptional Afro and mixed weddings internationally: Morocco, Senegal, Ivory Coast, Portugal and beyond.
services.item5_desc: Pilot every detail of your wedding from your dashboard: budget, guests, planning, vendors and day-of coordination — all in one secure space.
services.item6_desc: A personalized wedding site to share your story, your schedule and collect RSVPs from your guests. Digital elegance, effortless management.
services.item7_desc: Visual identity, premium invitations, ceremony stationery and signage: perfect graphic coherence, from save-the-date to seating chart.
services.item8_desc: Define the visual and artistic identity of your wedding: atmosphere, moodboard, color palette, scenography. We transform your inspirations into a coherent, unique creative direction.
services.item9_desc: Full coordination of your guests' transportation: shuttles, hotels, airport transfers. We handle every detail so your loved ones arrive serenely on your big day.
services.label: Our offering

platform.label: Our unique approach
platform.title: A platform, not just a wedding planner
platform.desc: Mariage Afro gives you access to a complete ecosystem: a network of 50+ verified vendors, rare cultural expertise, and a dedicated team to orchestrate every aspect of your Afro or mixed wedding, wherever you are.
platform.point1_desc: Photographers, videographers, caterers, DJs — all specialized and selected for Afro and mixed weddings.
platform.point2_desc: Unique Pan-African coverage: all 55 countries and islands of the African continent, their traditions, rituals, and the codes of a successful mixed wedding.
platform.point3_desc: One single point of contact, from the first consultation to the day after your wedding.

platform_page.title: Pilot your wedding from your dashboard
platform_page.subtitle: Nine integrated modules to centralize your wedding planning. The client pilots, we orchestrate.
platform_page.modules_title: Everything you need, in one place
platform_page.module1_desc: Global view of your wedding at a glance: countdown, upcoming tasks, alerts and overall progress.
platform_page.module1_benefit: You always know where you stand
platform_page.module2_desc: Complete tracking of your expenses by category, planned vs actual budget comparison, overspend alerts.
platform_page.module3_desc: Manage your guest list, track RSVP responses in real time, organize tables and dietary requirements.
platform_page.module4_desc: Complete timeline: preparation tasks, deadlines, hour-by-hour wedding day planning, vendor coordination.
platform_page.module5_desc: Centralize contracts, quotes, inspirations and admin documents in one secure space.
platform_page.module6_desc: Track selected vendors, their contracts, payment deadlines and wedding day contact details.
platform_page.module6_benefit: A clear view of all your partners
platform_page.module7_desc: Special mode activated on the big day: minute-by-minute timeline, emergency contacts, real-time checklist.
platform_page.module7_benefit: Enjoy the moment, we handle the rest
platform_page.module8_desc: Online RSVP, interactive seating plan and wedding gift fund centralized. Your guests access a dedicated space to confirm attendance and share their preferences.
platform_page.module9_desc: Real-time tracking of your budget, planning and confirmed vendors. A complete overview of your wedding, accessible from any device.
platform_page.module9_benefit: Pilot your wedding with full peace of mind
platform_page.cta_section_title: Ready to pilot your wedding with serenity?
platform_page.cta_section_desc: Book a free consultation to discover your future platform and discuss your project.

venues.title: Exceptional venues for your wedding
venues.subtitle: A curated selection of halls, estates and unique venues for Afro and mixed weddings, across Europe and beyond.
venues.form_desc: Tell us about your dream venue and we will help you book and organize it.

items.name: Domaine des Palmes
items.desc: An exceptional estate surrounded by landscaped gardens, ideal for weddings mixing tradition and contemporary elegance. Modular hall, panoramic terrace and adjoining chapel.

items.name: Château de Bellevue
items.desc: An 18th-century château with English-style park. A prestigious setting for elegant Afro weddings combining tradition and grandeur.

items.name: La Verrière des Arts
items.desc: A bright urban space with original glass roof. Perfect for contemporary weddings and Afro-European fusion ceremonies.

items.name: Le Pavillon Tropical
items.desc: Vast reception hall with tropical accents. Ideal for festive Afro weddings with XXL dance floor.

items.name: Le Mas de Liège
items.desc: Authentic stone mas with inner courtyard and centuries-old olive trees. A Mediterranean bubble for intimate weddings.

items.name: Salle des Cultures
items.desc: Large hall designed for multicultural celebrations. Neutral and modular space to fully personalize your decor.

shop.title: The visual identity of your wedding
shop.subtitle: Premium invitations, refined stationery, custom graphic identity. A collection designed for exceptional weddings.
shop.category1_desc: Exceptional printed invitations: textured paper, hot foil stamping, embossing. Each piece reflects the elegance of your union.
shop.category2_desc: Logo, monogram, color palette, typography. A unique graphic identity that will accompany you across all materials.
shop.category3_desc: Menus, table plans, place cards, ceremony booklets, welcome signs. Visual coherence from A to Z.
shop.category4_desc: The memory book of your wedding: photos, guest words, key moments. A work of art to keep forever.
shop.category5_desc: Personalized website, email invitations, online RSVP management. Digital elegance, zero stress.
shop.banner_desc: One single brief, one single contact, perfect coherence across all your stationery and digital materials.

realisations.title: Our Weddings

about.title: Our Story
about.quote: Mariage Afro was born from a simple observation: love has no borders, but it has roots.
about.text1: Founded in 2023, our platform is the result of event professionals' passion, who wanted to offer Afro and mixed couples around the world a space where their cultures would be understood, valued, and celebrated with elegance.
about.text2: Organizing a mixed or traditional Afro wedding requires particular expertise. You need to navigate between different family expectations, harmonize sometimes very different customs, and above all, create an event that reflects the couple while honoring their origins.
about.vision_text1: We believe that excellence lies in the details. Every wedding we accompany is treated as a unique work of art. We have brought together the best vendors, specialized and passionate, to offer you an international premium service.
about.vision_text2: Whether you dream of an intimate traditional ceremony or a grand reception fusing two cultures, we are here to transform your vision into an exceptional reality.
about.team_member1_bio: Specialized in Afro weddings for 10 years, Amara combines tradition and modernity to create unique ceremonies.
about.team_member2_bio: Passionate about African cultures, Chloé ensures every detail reflects the couple's identity.
about.team_member3_bio: Ismaël selects and coordinates our exclusive network of vendors specialized in Afro and mixed weddings.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We are here to listen and advise you.
contact.rdv_phone_desc: Call us directly to discuss your project. Available Monday to Friday, 9am–6pm.
contact.rdv_email_desc: Send us your request in writing. We respond within 24 business hours.
contact.rdv_inperson_desc: Meet us at our Brussels offices, by appointment only, for a personalized consultation.
contact.practical_hours: We are available Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm. Free consultations by appointment.

value_props.title: Why choose Mariage Afro?
value_props.item1_desc: A deep understanding of your traditions and customs for an authentic celebration.
value_props.item2_desc: Exclusive access to the best specialized vendors in Afro and mixed weddings.
value_props.item3_desc: Personalized guidance to bring your unique vision to life.
value_props.item4_desc: Enjoy your day, we manage every detail with excellence.

testimonials.label: They trust us
testimonials.title: What our couples say
testimonials.item1_quote: Un grand merci à Mariage afro pour son travail exceptionnel ! Professionnalisme, rigueur et disponibilité étaient au rendez-vous. Le résultat dépasse toutes nos attentes, et sa capacité à comprendre nos besoins a fait toute la différence. Je recommande vivement ses services à quiconque recherche qualité et efficacité. Bravo !
testimonials.item2_quote: On our special day, we didn't have to worry about anything, everything was taken care of which made us enjoy every moment of our wedding. It was an amazing and flawless day for us. Thank you very much.
testimonials.item3_quote: Met veel plezier samengewerkt met Mariage Afro voor een trouwfeest. Ze zijn heel professioneel, georganiseerd en een top ervaring van begin tot einde. Bedankt voor het vertrouwen en hopelijk tot snel bij een volgende samenwerking !
testimonials.item4_quote: Le travail fut de qualité, à l'écoute, disponible ! Je vous recommande !!!
testimonials.item5_quote: They integrated our cultural traditions with such delicacy — everything was respected and beautifully staged. A truly heartfelt experience.
testimonials.item6_quote: Detailed planning, timely reminders, punctual vendors… we just had to let ourselves be carried along. Mariage Afro is serenity from start to finish.
